title: eriogonum sphaerocephalum var. halimoides
intro: Eriogonum sphaerocephalum var. halimoides, also known as globemallow, is a perennial plant species belonging to the buckwheat family (Polygonaceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which make it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of globemallow include its ability to reduce inflammation, fight infections, and promote wound healing, making it a valuable herb for treating various health conditions. In herbal preparations, globemallow is often used as a tea, tincture, or salve to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
